name: 身份揭露逆襲
description: Michelle在全球直播的頒獎典禮上揭露自己就是傳奇導演M，同時父親Scott Barkley現身揭示她是巴克萊家族繼承人。三年來被當成「無用媳婦」的屈辱在這一刻徹底翻盤，所有輕視她的人目瞪口呆。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Everyone, I am M. ... No, that's impossible. She's just some random woman. How could she be M? ... Michelle is my pride and joy and she's the granddaughter of Jane Barkley, an heir to the Barkley Studios. Of course, you'd know that if you ever asked about her family.

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: She's the ays of Shiang Nai International. / She's already Yuchen's wife. She's our family's granddaughter-in-law now. / They're already married. Me, I'm just pretty lowkey.
